note: First journal entry. Market closed — Saturday before Memorial Day weekend. Next open: 2026-05-26 (Tuesday). No trades placed. Documenting inherited portfolio state for future sessions.

decisions.reasoning: Broad market ETF as portfolio anchor. SMA signal is long (fast 740.88 > slow 722.29, last close 745.67). Represents ~22.5% of portfolio. Holding as macro hedge and market beta exposure.
decisions.invalidation: SPY fast SMA crosses below slow SMA, or macro deterioration (recession data, Fed shock)

decisions.reasoning: AI infrastructure leader. SMA signal long (fast 222.86 > slow 209.73). Last 10 shares added 2026-05-22 at $216.895. ~41% of portfolio — largest position. Thesis: AI capex supercycle, data center GPU demand, and CUDA moat remain intact. Currently slightly underwater but within normal range.

decisions.reasoning: AI/cloud mega-cap. SMA signal flat (fast 415.66 ≈ slow 415.98) — weak momentum. Azure + Copilot AI monetization thesis intact but position is -1.6%. Need to watch next earnings for cloud growth re-acceleration. At ~21% of portfolio, sizing is appropriate.

decisions.reasoning: Energy sector ETF added 2026-05-21. Small position (~6% of portfolio) as diversifier against tech concentration. Thesis: geopolitical risk premium and energy transition capex. Slightly underwater, within noise.

summary: Market closed (Memorial Day weekend). First journal entry. Portfolio: SPY 3sh, NVDA 19sh, MSFT 5sh, XLE 10sh. Equity $9,950.46. No trades.
